visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a medium close-up of a young woman with long, wavy dark hair and a pink rabbit-ear digital filter on her head. She is wearing a vibrant pink V-neck top and is seated inside the cabin of a car. The lighting is bright and natural, coming from the car windows. She begins speaking directly to the camera with a playful expression. (2) As she continues her monologue, she raises her hand into the frame, gesturing with one finger to denote a list. Her facial features are clear, and she maintains steady eye contact with the lens. The car interior, including a leather seat headrest, is visible in the background. (3) The woman shifts her hand gesture to show two fingers and then three fingers as she proceeds through her numbered list. Her mouth movements are synchronized with her speech, and her expression remains animated. The pink rabbit filter follows her head movements accurately throughout the sequence. (4) In the final moments, she completes her statement with a slightly exaggerated smirk and continues gesturing before the video cuts. The background remains constant, showing the stationary car environment.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 據我所知. (2) [Subtitle]: 男人一共有分三種. (3) [Subtitle]: 第一種很虛榮. (4) [Subtitle]: 一定要找胸大的. (5) [Subtitle]: 第二種很單純. (6) [Subtitle]: 只要胸大的就可以了. (7) [Subtitle]: 第三種很現實. (8) [Subtitle]: 什麼都不要. (9) [Subtitle]: 只要胸大的.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice begins speaking in Traditional Chinese with a clear, moderate pitch and a playful, rhythmic tone. A cheerful, upbeat electronic BGM plays continuously in the background at a steady tempo. (2) A bright 'ding' sound effect triggers as she lists the first category of her monologue. The vocal delivery remains energetic and articulated. (3) A second 'ding' sound effect marks the transition to the next point in the list. The background music maintains its consistent rhythmic pulse without interruption. (4) A third 'ding' sound effect accompanies the final category. The speaker's voice rises slightly in volume and arousal toward the punchline. (5) The audio track concludes with the female speaker completing her sentence, followed by a short instrumental tail from the BGM as the recording ends.
